headline: Legacy Automakers GM and Ford Present a Contrarian EV Opportunity as Single-Digit P/Es Clash with Double-Digit Earnings Growth
summary: A valuation gap is emerging in EV stocks. While Tesla trades at a premium, legacy automakers GM and Ford show strong earnings growth at deeply discounted P/Es, offering a potential contrarian opportunity.

raw.headline: Legacy Automakers GM and Ford Present a Contrarian EV Opportunity as Single-Digit P/Es Clash with Double-Digit Earnings Growth

headline: Ford Just Won Its First J.D. Power Quality Crown Since 2010. Here's What It Means for the Stock.
summary: The automaker's quality push is starting to show up where shareholders feel it: costs.
